Package org.neuroml1.model.channel

Class DeprecatedOhmic.Conductance

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.neuroml1.model.channel.DeprecatedOhmic.Conductance
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Cloneable, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.CopyTo2, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.Equals2, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.HashCode2, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.ToString2
    Enclosing class:
    DeprecatedOhmic
    public static class DeprecatedOhmic.Conductance
extends Object
implements Cloneable, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.CopyTo2, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.Equals2, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.HashCode2, org.jvnet.jaxb2_commons.lang.ToString2

    Java class for anonymous complex type.

    The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

     <complexType>
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <group ref="{http://morphml.org/metadata/schema}metadata"/>
         <element name="rate_adjustments" type="{http://morphml.org/channelml/schema}RateAdjustments" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conc_factor" type="{http://morphml.org/channelml/schema}ConcFactor" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="gate" type="{http://morphml.org/channelml/schema}Gate" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
       <attribute name="default_gmax" use="required" type="{http://morphml.org/biophysics/schema}ConductanceDensityValue" />
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      • getGroup

        public List<String> getGroup()
        Gets the value of the group property.

        This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the JAXB object. This is why there is not a set method for the group property.

        For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

            getGroup().add(newItem);

        Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      • getRateAdjustments

        public RateAdjustments getRateAdjustments()
        Gets the value of the rateAdjustments property.
        Returns:
        possible object is RateAdjustments

        public void setRateAdjustments​(RateAdjustments value)
        Sets the value of the rateAdjustments property.

        value - allowed object is RateAdjustments

        public void setConcFactor​(ConcFactor value)
        Sets the value of the concFactor property.
        Parameters:
        value - allowed object is ConcFactor

      • getGate

        public List<Gate> getGate()
        Gets the value of the gate property.

        This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the JAXB object. This is why there is not a set method for the gate property.

        For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

            getGate().add(newItem);

        Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list Gate
